message:
Add circuit breaker integration tests and E2E support

- Add 6 integration tests in rchd/src/health.rs covering:
  - Health failures causing selection exclusion
  - Full circuit recovery path (Open → HalfOpen → Closed)
  - Half-open probe exhaustion behavior
  - Mixed circuit states selection preference
  - Failure in half-open reopening circuit
  - Health updates driving circuit transitions

- Add RCH_MOCK_CIRCUIT_OPEN mock support in daemon API
- Add circuit-open failure mode to e2e_test.sh
- Add #![allow(dead_code)] to scaffold modules

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
